changes: Added: Simple Decrypt minigame solver — auto-clicks the Decrypt button and waits for completion. Toggle via chrome.storage.sync.autoSimpleDecryptEnabled.
File Decryption flow: now recognises the Simple Decrypt minigame variant (previously timed out after 90s and could mark the job bugged after a few retries).
File Decryption flow: opens files via direct WebSocket (desktop.open.file) when the server-side fileId is known — bypasses the DOM lookup that fails on name mismatches or stale folder views.
File Decryption flow: tracks the file's live id during the run, so jobs survive the server re-issuing the encrypted file under the same name after take.
WebSocket interceptor: exposes desktop.get.options / open.folder / open.file RPCs and caches the Downloads folder id once per session.
UI: Overview, Expeditions and Auto Jobs sections now build their skeleton once and swap content atomically, eliminating the flicker that happened on every WebSocket update.
UI: Simple Decrypt toggle added next to Auto-decrypt and Auto-ICE-Wall in the Auto solvers card.
Update check: upstream release.json is now polled every 10 minutes (was every 6 hours) so new releases show up in the popup almost immediately.
